creator: jan@mcwinter.org
text:
after upgrading mate from version 1.6 to 1.8, mate-porter-manager crash with a core dump.

$ mate-power-manager 
** (mate-power-manager:52972): WARNING **: levels is 0!
Segmentation fault (core dumped)


$ gdb -c mate-power-manager.core  /usr/local/bin/mate-power-manager
....
....
(gdb) bt
#0  0x000000000041ab16 in ?? ()
#1  0x00000008041da702 in g_main_context_dispatch () from /usr/local/lib/libglib-2.0.so.0
#2  0x00000008041daaa3 in g_main_context_pending () from /usr/local/lib/libglib-2.0.so.0
#3  0x00000008041dadcf in g_main_loop_run () from /usr/local/lib/libglib-2.0.so.0
#4  0x0000000000410877 in ?? ()
#5  0x0000000000408b5f in ?? ()
#6  0x000000080064c000 in ?? ()
#7  0x0000000000000000 in ?? ()
